questionHtml:
0.20 mol of magnesium is mixed with 0.10 mol of hydrochloric acid.

Mg (s)+2HCl (aq)→MgCl2 (aq)+H2 (g)

Which is correct?

meta.title: 0.20 mol of magnesium is mixed with 0.10 mol of hydrochloric acid. Mg (s)+2HCl (aq)→MgCl2 (aq)+H2 (g) Which is correct?
breadcrumbLabels: Reactivity 2. How much, how fast and how far?
Reactivity 2.1—How much? The amount of chemical change
Reactivity 2.1.3—The limiting reactant determines the theoretical yield. Identify the limiting and excess reactants from given data.
